handoff.reason: Rolling Phase-2 program promoted from STUB-XK82Z2 with deferred phases bound to STUB-QT400D, STUB-K5YBFN, STUB-XX4JBC

execution_rules.notes: Rolling plan: Phase 1 fully planned; Phases 2-4 plan_deferred=true with hard_stops approved=false — each requires explicit planning + approval after the prior phase is COMPLETED + REVIEWED. Integrator lane: land to main + push per phase.

hard_constraints: Locked 12-field ValidationReport schema: additive evidence fields only, no enum/required-field breaks
All 833 relative_target_not_in_project targets verified existing on disk (812 via .js->.ts) — fix is membership logic, not data
Operator rulings 2026-06-12 baked into deferred stubs: K5YBFN option A (tag + src-only counts), XX4JBC option A (evidence-level flag)
Integrator lane: commit to main + push per phase

decisions_log.note: integrator single-checkout lane; commits land straight on main per WO constraint
no semantic-validator runtime in executor dir; constraints checked manually: locked 12-field report untouched, additive-only fix, integrator lane honored
quick discovery executed inline: import-resolver.ts read end-to-end; bug localized to probeRelative (no .js->.ts NodeNext mapping); repo's own imports use .js suffixes

plan_adjustments.summary: P1-T5 gate: 1600/1600 collected tests PASS (incl. 5 new membership tests). One test FILE uncollectable (check-header-coverage.test.ts, SyntaxError at collection) - PROVEN PRE-EXISTING via stash test (fails identically without the resolver fix); minimal repro: any vitest test importing scripts/check-header-coverage.mjs fails collection while plain node import works. Filed STUB-Z1ETZD (CODEREF-CORE). Gate accepted as PASS-with-pre-existing-note per flaky/contention-note precedent.

P1-T4 repopulate surfaced exports_match_ast stale on coderef-mcp-server.ts: scanner marks nested fn buildToolHandlers.inboundByKind exported:true (inherits parent flag); header is honest (2 real exports). Latent finding - first full populate since MCP server landed; resolver fix does not touch export extraction. Filed STUB-5WVGHD (CODEREF-CORE). header_coverage 99.24->98.85, header_stale 0->1, header_export_mismatch 0->1 in refreshed baseline are explained by this, not by the membership fix.

communication_log.message: WO created from STUB-XK82Z2 (roadmap PHASE-2.UNRESOLVED-EDGE-AUDIT). Rolling plan: P1 membership-check fix planned (7 tasks); P2-P4 deferred to STUB-QT400D/K5YBFN/XX4JBC. Discovery: 64 candidates; RAG fallback (server down).
